longFormRunPolicy.rule: Each active long-form run may consider three exploratory model structures and must collapse them into one final fourth structure before the current run window ends.

timeDilationPolicy.rule: If the active long-form task map completes earlier than its expected review windows, the agentic working group may pull work only from the next declared task map and not beyond it.

tasks.label: Release Candidate Cycle
tasks.purpose: Run the governed release-candidate conveyor and publish the latest candidate evidence bundle.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest release-candidate bundle contains a build-evidence manifest.
escalatesWhen: local cycle status becomes blocked
release-candidate run cannot emit a valid evidence bundle

tasks.label: Daily HITL Digest
tasks.purpose: Emit the daily review surface that tells us whether the build can continue unattended or now owes human review.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest digest bundle contains release-candidate-digest.json and release-candidate-digest.md.
escalatesWhen: digest posture requires immediate HITL
digest bundle cannot be produced

tasks.label: Promotion Watch
tasks.authority: Automation may classify; HITL decides promotion
tasks.purpose: Track whether the current automation posture is clear to continue, requires HITL, or is blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: Current posture is reflected in local-automation-tasking-status.json.
escalatesWhen: recommended action changes to review-required-before-promotion
latest posture changes to blocked

tasks.label: Scheduler Watch
tasks.trigger: scheduled task registration and next-run clock
tasks.purpose: Track whether the local Windows scheduler is registered, ready, and aligned to the next release-candidate cadence.
tasks.completionSignal: Scheduled task is registered and exposes a next run time.
outputs: Windows Scheduled Task: OAN Mortalis Governed Automation Cycle
escalatesWhen: scheduled task is not registered
scheduled task has no next run time

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 01
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Make the current local automation cycle report transitions, first scheduled execution truth, and status freshness without requiring manual probing.

tasks.label: Notification Surface
tasks.purpose: Emit a bounded local notification or inbox surface when posture changes from clear-to-continue to hitl-required or blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: A posture transition produces a stable local notification artifact without widening publication authority.
escalatesWhen: notification output requires external authority
notification cannot distinguish hitl-required from blocked

tasks.label: First Scheduled Run Capture
tasks.purpose: Capture and report the first scheduler-driven execution so the machine proves it can move without manual invocation.
tasks.completionSignal: Task board records a real scheduler last-run time and links it to the latest release-candidate bundle.
escalatesWhen: scheduled execution fails to produce a bundle
scheduler advances without state refresh

tasks.label: Status Freshness Reconciliation
tasks.purpose: Keep cycle state, digest state, task board state, and scheduler state in agreement after unattended runs.
tasks.completionSignal: The task board can prove which live artifact is newest and whether any status surface is stale.
escalatesWhen: task board timestamps drift from cycle or digest truth
scheduler next-run and cycle next-run disagree materially

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 02
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Deepen unattended evidence quality without crossing into ungated promotion authority.

tasks.label: Delta Summary Surface
tasks.purpose: Summarize what changed between the latest release-candidate bundle and the previous one.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest digest includes a bounded delta summary without inferring maturity.
escalatesWhen: delta logic starts inferring authority or promotion
previous bundle truth is unavailable

tasks.label: Artifact Retention Pruning
tasks.purpose: Prune or compact old local evidence bundles according to declared retention policy while preserving review truth.
tasks.completionSignal: Retention policy can delete or compact stale local bundles without harming active review surfaces.
escalatesWhen: pruning would delete the current active review surface
retention classification becomes governance-significant

tasks.label: Blocked Escalation Bundle
tasks.purpose: Prepare a bounded escalation bundle when the automation posture becomes blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: A blocked posture produces one stable bundle that points to the exact failing evidence surfaces.
escalatesWhen: escalation bundle widens into autonomous remediation
blocked evidence cannot be localized

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 03
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Introduce seeded governance participation into unattended build review, reconcile scheduler/runtime cadence truth, and expose a CME formalization consolidation surface without widening promotion authority.

tasks.label: Seeded Governance Lane
tasks.authority: Seed may classify; HITL decides promotion
tasks.purpose: Let the seeded local host interpret routine build evidence, delta surfaces, and preflight posture without widening release authority.
tasks.completionSignal: A seeded governance bundle is emitted and classified as Accepted, Deferred, or Rejected with bounded provenance.
escalatesWhen: seed feedback tries to promote or publish by implication
seed host availability or readiness remains unresolved across review windows

tasks.label: Scheduler Cadence Reconciliation
tasks.purpose: Keep the Windows scheduled task aligned with the release-candidate cadence recorded in the live cycle state.
tasks.completionSignal: Scheduler reconciliation state shows the registered task is aligned to the declared cadence within tolerance.
escalatesWhen: the scheduler cannot be registered or rescheduled locally
cycle next-run truth and scheduler next-run truth keep drifting materially

tasks.label: CME Formalization Consolidation Surface
tasks.purpose: Expose whether the governing build layer is still exploratory, seed-assisted, braided, or crystallizing without narrating that as release authority.
tasks.completionSignal: A stable consolidation state is emitted from current automation, seed, and scheduler truth.
escalatesWhen: consolidation logic starts pretending exploratory state is authoritative
seed and scheduler truth remain materially contradictory

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 04
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Close promotion and release rehearsal once seeded governance and runtime cadence are stable.

tasks.label: Promotion Gate Bundle
tasks.purpose: Assemble the exact evidence bundle required for modular-set promotion without inferring authority from green output alone.
tasks.completionSignal: A bounded promotion gate bundle exists with explicit reasons for continue, defer, or block.
escalatesWhen: promotion evidence is incomplete
promotion logic starts inferring maturity from tests alone

tasks.label: CI Artifact Concordance
tasks.purpose: Prove local candidate artifacts and CI candidate artifacts agree on content and version posture.
tasks.completionSignal: Local and CI artifact manifests reconcile without unexplained drift.
escalatesWhen: artifact manifests diverge materially
CI artifact production is missing or incomplete

tasks.label: Release Ratification Rehearsal
tasks.purpose: Rehearse the first publish ratification path so promotion is evidence-led rather than improvised.
tasks.completionSignal: The release rehearsal produces a stable ratification checklist with no hidden machine-local assumptions.
escalatesWhen: release rehearsal depends on undeclared deployables
ratification still requires exploratory interpretation rather than bounded evidence

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 05
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Stabilize first publish intent and seeded promotion review once promotion evidence is consistently reproducible.

tasks.label: Seeded Promotion Review
tasks.purpose: Let the seeded host synthesize the promotion gate, CI concordance, and ratification rehearsal into one bounded advisory review.
tasks.completionSignal: A seeded promotion review bundle exists without widening promotion authority.
escalatesWhen: seed review starts substituting for ratification
seed advice conflicts materially with promotion evidence

tasks.label: First Publish Intent Closure
tasks.purpose: State exactly what first publish means for the current modular set so automation is not guessing at the target.
tasks.completionSignal: A bounded first-publish intent surface exists and matches declared deployables.
escalatesWhen: publish intent exceeds declared deployables
publish intent conflicts with current version policy

tasks.label: Release Handshake Surface
tasks.purpose: Expose the last bounded handshake before a real publish request so the stack can show what is ready, deferred, and still blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: A release handshake surface is emitted from current promotion evidence and advisory posture.
escalatesWhen: handshake surface starts implying publication
release evidence cannot be localized into one surface

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 06
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Prepare the first bounded publish request and post-publish evidence loop once the handshake surface is stable.

tasks.label: Publish Request Envelope
tasks.purpose: Prepare the bounded publish request surface once the release handshake becomes stable.
tasks.completionSignal: A publish request envelope can be emitted without expanding deployable scope or publication authority by implication.
escalatesWhen: publish request exceeds declared deployables
publish request is attempted before release handshake stability

tasks.label: Post-Publish Evidence Loop
tasks.purpose: Collect the first post-publish evidence bundle and reconcile it against the candidate and handshake surfaces.
tasks.completionSignal: A bounded post-publish evidence loop can compare the published artifact against the pre-publish evidence chain.
escalatesWhen: published artifact cannot be reconciled to the candidate bundle
post-publish evidence starts implying new authority

tasks.label: Seed Braid Escalation Lane
tasks.purpose: Let the seed braid participate in escalation after the first publish lane begins to carry real-world consequences.
tasks.completionSignal: A bounded escalation lane exists for seeded review after publication without silently substituting for ratification.
escalatesWhen: seed escalation starts overriding HITL
post-publish contradictions remain unresolved across review windows

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 07
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Stabilize live publication execution and the first external evidence loop once a bounded publish request is ratified.

tasks.label: Published Runtime Receipt
tasks.purpose: Capture the first bounded receipt that a real runtime artifact was published through the declared lane.
tasks.completionSignal: A published runtime receipt exists and can be reconciled to the publish request envelope.
escalatesWhen: publication occurs without a bounded receipt
published receipt cannot be matched to the request envelope

tasks.label: Artifact Attestation Surface
tasks.purpose: Compare the published runtime artifact against the candidate and post-publish evidence surfaces.
tasks.completionSignal: An attestation surface can show whether the published artifact matches the bounded pre-publish chain.
escalatesWhen: artifact attestation detects unexplained drift
attestation starts implying authority beyond evidence

tasks.label: Post-Publish Drift Watch
tasks.purpose: Watch the first post-publish interval for drift between the live runtime and the bounded evidence chain.
tasks.completionSignal: A drift-watch surface can report stable, divergent, or blocked post-publish posture.
escalatesWhen: published runtime diverges from the evidence chain
drift watch cannot localize the divergence

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 08
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Consolidate the first real publication loop into a stable operational governance surface once live publication is observed.

tasks.label: Operational Publication Ledger
tasks.purpose: Capture the bounded operational ledger entry once the first real publication is no longer hypothetical.
tasks.completionSignal: A stable publication ledger can reconcile request, receipt, and runtime observation.
escalatesWhen: publication ledger drifts from the bounded request chain
operational publication occurs without governed receipts

tasks.label: External Consumer Concordance
tasks.purpose: Compare the published surface seen by external consumers against the bounded publication evidence chain.
tasks.completionSignal: A concordance surface can show whether external consumers receive the artifact the stack thinks it published.
escalatesWhen: external consumer view diverges from the publication ledger
consumer concordance implies authority beyond observed evidence

tasks.label: Post-Publish Governance Loop
tasks.purpose: Stabilize the first complete governance loop after real publication enters the world.
tasks.completionSignal: A bounded governance loop can carry publication, observation, and contradiction handling without collapsing into improvisation.
escalatesWhen: governance loop cannot reconcile live publication with evidence
seeded governance starts substituting for human ratification post-publication

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 09
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Operationalize the first multi-interval publication cycle once the initial publication loop is no longer singular.

tasks.label: Publication Cadence Ledger
tasks.purpose: Track repeated publication intervals as one governed cadence instead of isolated publication events.
tasks.completionSignal: A publication cadence ledger can reconcile multiple intervals without losing the original receipt chain.
escalatesWhen: publication cadence diverges from the bounded operational ledger
new publication intervals occur without governed cadence entries

tasks.label: Downstream Runtime Observation
tasks.purpose: Observe how downstream runtime surfaces continue to receive and reflect the published artifact across more than one interval.
tasks.completionSignal: A downstream observation surface can compare repeated runtime observations against the publication cadence ledger.
escalatesWhen: downstream observation drifts from the cadence ledger
downstream observation implies authority beyond observed evidence

tasks.label: Multi-Interval Governance Braid
tasks.purpose: Braid seeded governance and HITL review across more than one publication interval without improvising release authority.
tasks.completionSignal: A bounded multi-interval governance braid can reconcile cadence, downstream observation, and contradiction handling.
escalatesWhen: the governance braid cannot reconcile repeated publication intervals
seeded governance starts substituting for human ratification across cadence changes

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 10
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Prove unattended scheduler execution across real intervals and watch dormant surfaces for contradiction without confusing honesty for failure.

tasks.label: Scheduler Execution Receipt
tasks.purpose: Capture the first real scheduler-driven automation run as a bounded receipt instead of assuming unattended life from registration alone.
tasks.completionSignal: A scheduler execution receipt can show whether a real scheduled run has been observed and reconciled to the active cycle.
escalatesWhen: the scheduler stays registered but never produces a real run receipt
scheduler execution receipts cannot be localized to the governed cycle

tasks.label: Unattended Interval Concordance
tasks.purpose: Compare scheduler-driven execution truth against the current release-candidate cycle so unattended proof is evidence-led rather than assumed.
tasks.completionSignal: An unattended interval concordance surface can show whether scheduled execution and cycle state remain in bounded agreement.
escalatesWhen: scheduled execution drifts materially from recorded cycle truth
manual overhang hides the absence of unattended execution proof

tasks.label: Stale Surface Contradiction Watch
tasks.authority: Automation may detect; HITL resolves contradictions
tasks.purpose: Watch dormant and publication-adjacent surfaces for ordering contradictions so the stack stays honest while it waits for real-world intervals to occur.
tasks.completionSignal: A contradiction-watch surface can distinguish dormant-consistent state from actual surface-ordering contradictions.
escalatesWhen: a downstream or cadence surface outruns its prerequisite evidence
dormant publication surfaces start narrating impossible state transitions

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 11
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Carry unattended waiting truth across real cadence windows, collapse scheduler proof when it arrives, and prove stable silence is integrity rather than neglect.

tasks.label: Unattended Proof Collapse
tasks.purpose: Collapse scheduler execution, unattended concordance, and contradiction-watch truth into one bounded unattended proof surface without pretending proof exists before it does.
tasks.completionSignal: An unattended proof collapse bundle can say whether unattended proof is still pending, materially matched, or held by contradiction.
escalatesWhen: scheduler proof is narrated as collapsed before a real scheduled run exists
contradiction-watch and unattended proof collapse disagree materially

tasks.label: Dormant Window Ledger
tasks.purpose: Track how many real candidate windows have remained dormant-consistent so waiting is counted as evidence-bearing continuity rather than empty delay.
tasks.completionSignal: A dormant window ledger can count consecutive dormant-consistent windows without losing the active release-candidate run it is observing.
escalatesWhen: dormant windows are counted without a new candidate interval
dormant waiting is silently converted into proof of scheduler execution

tasks.label: Silent Cadence Integrity
tasks.authority: Automation may detect; HITL resolves contradictions
tasks.purpose: Verify that candidate-ready unattended stretches stay quiet until a real review edge or contradiction arrives, so the machine does not demand attention just because it is alive.
tasks.completionSignal: A silent cadence integrity surface can distinguish stable quiet from overdue review, noisy false escalation, or blocked posture.
escalatesWhen: candidate-ready posture emits transition noise without cause
daily review edges are allowed to go stale without surfacing the breach

longFormTaskMaps.label: Automation Maturation Map 12
longFormTaskMaps.goal: Let the active long-form run witness real unattended evidence, advance its exploratory structures lawfully, and collapse at the window edge without pretending scheduler proof that has not arrived.

tasks.label: Long-Form Phase Witness
tasks.purpose: Determine which exploratory or final structure the active long-form run has actually earned from unattended evidence without skipping phases by narrative implication.
tasks.completionSignal: A long-form phase witness bundle can name the current active phase and the next lawful target phase from live unattended evidence.
escalatesWhen: the active phase advances without supporting unattended evidence
the witness tries to collapse the run before the boundary or proof warrants it

tasks.label: Long-Form Window Boundary
tasks.purpose: Track whether the active long-form run remains safely within its current review window, is nearing collapse, or has reached the boundary where a final structure must be recorded.
tasks.completionSignal: A window-boundary receipt can say whether the run is within window, nearing edge, or at collapse time.
escalatesWhen: the active run passes its window edge without a recorded boundary surface
the boundary receipt contradicts the run timeframe

tasks.label: Autonomous Long-Form Collapse
tasks.authority: Automation may update run state; HITL resolves contradiction
tasks.purpose: Apply witnessed unattended evidence and boundary truth onto the active long-form run so the machine can walk its own exploratory structures and collapse them lawfully.
tasks.completionSignal: The active long-form run state and bundle reflect the current lawful phase without manual rewriting.
escalatesWhen: run-state collapse outruns the phase witness
window-edge collapse would hide the absence of scheduler proof instead of recording it honestly
